prompt: A clean minimalist illustration on a light gray background, drawn in a simple hand-drawn line-art style with dark navy blue outlines and selective pastel pink fill. Show a sleepy young woman with a short blunt bob haircut in pastel pink, seated at a desk and working on an open laptop. She is shown in 3/4 view facing left, with droopy half-closed eyes and a tired, unamused expression. She wears a loose cardigan in pastel pink over a simple top, and sits in a lightly sketched chair. On the desk, include exactly 3 objects: 1 open laptop in front of her, 1 takeaway coffee cup with a lid behind the laptop, and 1 smartphone near the lower right corner of the desk. Keep the lines loose, casual, and slightly imperfect, like a stylish editorial doodle. Place large text to the left of the character reading NEMUTAI in bold uppercase serif letters in dark navy, with the word girl overlapping it in a smaller cursive script in pastel pink. Add a small handwritten artist signature near the bottom right edge of the desk. Lots of negative space, flat colors, no shading, modern feminine mood, sleepy work-from-home vibe, balanced composition.
